# Solomon Islands Eco Tourism

> Marketplace pairing affluent purpose-driven travellers with 5-star Solomon Islands eco lodges and active marine conservation projects. Premium 4 to 7 day journeys. Every booking funds reef restoration.

## Positioning
Work. Learn. Restore.

## Pricing
$2,500 to $5,000 per guest, all-inclusive of accommodation, conservation experience, inter-island transport, concierge.

## How money is split
On a typical $2,500 package: platform 30% ($750), hotel margin 12% ($300), conservation project share 20% of experience fees ($500), accommodation pass-through $1,200, transport pass-through $50.

## Cancellation
60+ days: 90% refund. 30 to 60 days: 50%. 15 to 30 days: 25%. Under 15 days: 0% refund except medical or force majeure.

## Insurance
Comprehensive traveller insurance covering medical evacuation is required at booking.

## Contact
hello@solomonislandseco.example

## Site map
- Home (for travellers): https://jeanbap.github.io/solomon-islands-eco-tourism/
- For hotels (B2B partnership pitch): https://jeanbap.github.io/solomon-islands-eco-tourism/for-hotels/
- For conservation projects (B2B partnership pitch): https://jeanbap.github.io/solomon-islands-eco-tourism/for-projects/
- Blog index: https://jeanbap.github.io/solomon-islands-eco-tourism/blog/
- Marine biodiversity reference: https://jeanbap.github.io/solomon-islands-eco-tourism/marine-biodiversity/
- Impact calculator: https://jeanbap.github.io/solomon-islands-eco-tourism/impact-calculator/
- Project profile, Tetepare Descendants Association: https://jeanbap.github.io/solomon-islands-eco-tourism/projects/tetepare-descendants-association/
- Project profile, Arnavon Community Marine Conservation Area: https://jeanbap.github.io/solomon-islands-eco-tourism/projects/arnavon-community-marine-conservation-area/
- Project profile, Coral Sea Foundation: https://jeanbap.github.io/solomon-islands-eco-tourism/projects/coral-sea-foundation/
- Partner spotlight, Uepi Island Resort: https://jeanbap.github.io/solomon-islands-eco-tourism/partners/uepi-island-resort/
